memory.summary: I have a plan to finish the assignment analysis before reading, but a friend just invited me to lunch.
I made good progress on the assignment analysis, and my friends are now ready to order lunch.
I made steady progress on the assignment analysis, increasing completion from 0.58 to 0.69 in 1.5 hours.
I missed the 18:00 deadline for the analysis section despite reaching 78% completion, and I am now stressed with a sleep debt.
I pushed the analysis progress to 84% despite being late and stressed, but I still missed the 18:00 deadline.
I continued the analysis but missed the assigned reading deadline entirely, leaving me with unfinished work and accumulated stress.
I made progress on the analysis section, but I still missed the 18:00 deadline and am carrying stress with a sleep debt.
I made slow progress on the analysis section, but I am still behind schedule with a significant sleep debt and high stress.
I made slight progress on the analysis, but my energy is critically low and sleep debt remains high despite working past the deadline.
Despite working past the deadline, my progress on the analysis section has completely stalled at 0.95 while my energy is now zero and stress remains high.
I finally broke the stall on the analysis section, but my energy is now completely depleted after working past midnight.
I pushed through with 0.5 hours of work, advancing the analysis to 0.98, but my energy remains at zero and stress is high.
